meta.title: Your First Song!
meta.subtitle: Play a real song using Em and A major chords.

objectives: Play a complete song from start to finish
Use Em and A major chords in a pattern
Perform your first piece of music!

steps.title: You're ready for a REAL song!
steps.body: This is it—the moment you've been working toward! You know E minor, A major, and how to switch between them. That means you can play a REAL SONG! We're going to learn a simple, beautiful melody that uses just these 2 chords.

steps.title: The song pattern
steps.body: Our song has a simple pattern: Em (4 strums) → A (4 strums) → Em (4 strums) → A (4 strums). That's it! We'll repeat this pattern to make a complete song. Let's break it down step by step.

steps.title: Part A: The verse
steps.body: Start with E minor. Strum down 4 times, counting '1, 2, 3, 4'. Switch to A major. Strum down 4 times: '1, 2, 3, 4'. That's Part A! Practice this until you can do it smoothly without stopping.

steps.title: Part B: The chorus
steps.body: Now do the same thing again: Em (4 strums) → A (4 strums). This is Part B—it's the same as Part A, but we're repeating it to make the song longer. Try playing Part A, then Part B without stopping.

steps.title: Put it all together
steps.body: Here's the full song: Part A (Em-A) + Part B (Em-A) = 16 total strums! That's: Em, Em, Em, Em, A, A, A, A, Em, Em, Em, Em, A, A, A, A. Play this all the way through. Congratulations—you just played a song!

steps.title: Make it musical
steps.body: Now let's make it sound even better! Try strumming softer on the Em parts (gentle and moody) and louder on the A parts (bright and strong). This is called 'dynamics'—it makes your playing more expressive and musical!

steps.title: Your first performance
steps.body: Can you play the whole song from start to finish without stopping? Even if you make mistakes, keep going—that's what real musicians do! When you're ready, play it one more time like you're performing for an audience. You've got this!

steps.title: 🎸 YOU JUST PLAYED A SONG!
steps.body: AMAZING! You just played your first complete song on guitar! 🎉🎵 Do you realize how incredible that is? You went from never touching a guitar to playing actual music! This is a moment to be proud of. Every famous guitarist started exactly where you are—with their first song. Keep practicing, keep playing, and most importantly—keep having fun! You're a guitarist now! 🌟🎸
